title: Arkudii's Detailed Hypixel Skyblock
description: More details and features for Hypixel Skyblock!
body:
This Resourcepack adds more details and features to improve your gameplay in Hypixel Skyblock! [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament/versions) >=3.10.0 is required for pack to work properly! With earlier versions you can have bugs with textures! Use [Respackops](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) for configure the pack. ### Textures Mining Textures work only with [FurfSky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn) or [FurfSky Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-legacy): - Gemstone textures - Metals textures - Hard Stone texture - Glacite texture - Timite texture - FIX for old FurfSky gemstone textures. Dwarven Mines Textures: - Cool Dark Monolith - Titanium Ore Light and Dark End Textures: - End Diorite - End Granite - Chiseled End Stone - End Stone Pillar - End Stone (slabs & stairs too) - End Portal Frame - Dark Sand and Sandstone Cool End: - End Magenta Crystals - End Purple Crystals - End Sea Lantern - Ender Node as Ore - Ender Node as Ender Bee Hive Crimson Isle: - Blaze Fire Totem (Blaze Slayer Fire Pillar) - Fire Geyser (Blaze Slayer DDR Apocalypse) - Opal textures - Sulphur Ore Cool Spider Den: - Dirt Slab - Dirt Carpet - Cobblestone Carpet Cool Hub: - Dirt Slab Cool Galatea: - Dirt Path Slab - Dirt Path Stairs Cool Rift: - Dirt Slab Dark Snow: - The Mist - Glacite Tunnels - Mineshafts - The Rift Ghosts Floor Feature: - Dark glass or - Stone glass Garden Textures: - WIP block for TNT Dungeons Dark Mode
